channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish dumped along side the Old Fire Station, 3rd July
item.description:
Rubbish dumped and attracting more.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree obstructing view of oncoming traffic, 3rd July
item.description:
On the corner of Chaucer Road the overgrowth at the base of the tree is obstructing the view of oncoming traffic pulling out of Chaucer to hurst Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 216, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Volkswagen Touran, 3rd July
item.description:
Someone left the car on our parking and is there for one month now…it is not taxed and is blocking our parking. The car is black Volkswagen Touran AK55 KLZ
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned/Untaxed vehicles, 3rd July
item.description:
There a large number of vehicles, possibly over 25+ which are known to belong to Blackhorse motors of Pembroke Road which appear to be abandoned or taking up residents parking on local roads and also the Bomdatts building on Valley Road, these vehicles are a constant eyesore to the area and have remained parked for number of years along with others which could be for sale. This has been an issue with residents of Pembroke Road, Battle Road, Valley Road and Park Gardens.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside 89 Maple Road, 3rd July
item.description:
A large amount of rubbish has been dumped outside 89 Maple Road. Bin bags have been ripped and rubbish spilling onto the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maple Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on building, 3rd July
item.description:
This has been reported and ignored

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitecross Estate, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light not working, 3rd July
item.description:
Light on footpath REAR of 95 Aspen Green public field not working. Area very dark . NB This is PEABODY land.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aspen Green, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light in park or open space

item.title: Yet more fly-tipping on north side of Charlton Park.Lane by Charlton Park, 3rd July
item.description:
Much of.pavement width covered by fly tipping on north side of Charlton Park Lane opposite Meridian Sports Club. Also two areas of broken glass on same stretch of pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 big bags of garden waste, 3rd July
item.description:
2 big bags of garden waste dumped under tree near postbox

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped chair, 3rd July
item.description:
Chair dumped outside residents bin room but non-resident, a regular occurrence.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Battery Road, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: M11 A track MP 29/7-30/3 Roadway worn out, 3rd July
item.description:
Between these two markers posts there are various potholes, some have been filled some have not. The whole area looks like a patchwork quilt. Very uneven and bumpy. this whole section of road surface looks worn out and needs replacing....Not good on the suspension or tyres. Needs inspecting.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M11, Epping Forest
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: M11 A track MP27/3-27/6....lane 1.....very dangerous road surface, 3rd July
item.description:
The road is cracked and uneven and is in a poor state, very dangerous for motorcyclists as well as vehicles. The whole 300 meter section needs inspection urgently.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M11, Epping Forest
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish poss blocking fire exit, 3rd July
item.description:
There are two ways out of the building, at the bottom of the steps. One way is largely blocked by heaps of furniture, trolleys, mattresses, and an upended Lime bike that may or may not be broken. Fire hazard?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cooper's Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of different rubbish behind electrical sub station, 3rd July
item.description:
This is ongoing problem. This time it's here for 3 weeks. Someone uses this are as their bin.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Camelot Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a dead cat towards the end of Hartville Road near the Barth Road corner, 3rd July
item.description:
There is a dead cat on the pavement on Hartville Road/Barth Road corner. It is a tuxedo cat, long hair, has no tail and is rotting on the pavement. It is laying next to a black rubbish bag
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barth Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Oakley square, 3rd July
item.description:
Young trees not watered and no hydration bags

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Oakley Square, Somers Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Watering - Young tree not being watered

item.title: Priory park Road - between St Julian Road and Kilburn high road (right side looking at Kilburn High Road), 3rd July
item.description:
Lots of glass between oriel house and Kyle house on the inner part of the pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Priory Park Rd and St Julian Road, 3rd July
item.description:
Estate agency sign thrown there

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture blocking the pavement, 3rd July
item.description:
Large amount of furniture dumped on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bags of rubbish are now in the road, 3rd July
item.description:
Dumped bags of rubbish were on the pavement the other day, now in the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maiden Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
